query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employment_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionHolderId INT NOT NULL,
  positionId INT NOT NULL,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('offer_letter', 'employment_agreement', 'contractor_agreement', 'w4_form', 'i9_form', 'w9_form', 'job_description', 'direct_deposit_form', 'handbook_acknowledgment', 'confidentiality_agreement', 'non_compete_agreement', 'operating_agreement_amendment', 'membership_certificate', 'board_resolution', 'background_check_authorization', 'termination_letter', 'resignation_letter') NOT NULL,
  documentName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  documentVersion INT DEFAULT 1,
  vaultDocumentId INT,
  s3Url VARCHAR(500),
  requiresSignature BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  signedAt TIMESTAMP,
  signedByUserId INT,
  signatureHash VARCHAR(64),
  witnessRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  witnessName VARCHAR(255),
  witnessSignedAt TIMESTAMP,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_signature', 'signed', 'expired', 'superseded', 'voided') DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employment_documents (

  positionId INT NOT NULL,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('offer_letter', 'employment_agreement', 'contractor_agreement', 'w4_form', 'i9_form', 'w9_form', 'job_description', 'direct_deposit_form', 'handbook_acknowledgment', 'confidentiality_agreement', 'non_compete_agreement', 'operating_agreement_amendment', 'membership_certificate', 'board_resolution', 'background_check_authorization', 'termination_letter', 'resignation_letter') NOT NULL,
  documentName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  documentVersion INT DEFAULT 1,
  vaultDocumentId INT,
  s3Url VARCHAR(500),
  requiresSignature BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  signedAt TIMESTAMP,
  signedByUserId INT,
  signatureHash VARCHAR(64),
  witnessRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  witnessName VARCHAR(255),
  witnessSignedAt TIMESTAMP,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_signature', 'signed', 'expired', 'superseded', 'voided') DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
